name: Ham Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep baking dish, alternate layers of ham and apples.
2. Sprinkle each layer with onions and seasonings.
3. Moisten each layer with bouillon.
4. Cover the top layer with thick mashed potatoes.
5. Brush the potato peaks with melted butter.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 1/2 to 2 hours until ham is thoroughly heated and potato peaks are browned.
